Jessica Taylor
Dallas, TX

Summary
Dedicated warehouse associate with over 1 year of experience in fast-paced environments. Proven ability to operate RF scanners and perform physical tasks such as lifting heavy items up to 50 lbs. Adept at maintaining inventory accuracy and ensuring safety protocols are followed. Strong team player with basic computer skills and a commitment to improving warehouse operations.

Experience

Warehouse Associate  
ABC Distribution Center, Dallas, TX  
March 2022 - Present  
- Operate RF scanners to track inventory and assist with order fulfillment.  
- Perform physical labor, including lifting and moving products weighing up to 50 lbs.  
- Collaborate with team members to ensure efficient processing of incoming and outgoing shipments.  
- Maintain a clean and organized work area in compliance with safety standards.

Stock Clerk  
XYZ Retail Warehouse, Richardson, TX  
January 2021 - February 2022  
- Managed stock levels and organized products on shelves for easy access.  
- Assisted in unloading shipments and stocking merchandise in the warehouse.  
- Utilized basic computer systems to update inventory records and track product locations.  
- Supported team with daily operations, contributing to a 15% increase in efficiency.
